# Su Myat Noe — IT Business Analyst

> Su Myat Noe (nickname "Su") is an IT Business Analyst with 3+ years of fully
> remote experience, specializing in financial technology. She translates
> business needs into executable technical specifications and drives data-backed
> process improvements. Based in Da Nang, Vietnam; available for remote roles
> worldwide with one month's notice.

## Summary

- **Name:** Su Myat Noe (Su)
- **Role:** IT Business Analyst / Business System Analyst
- **Specialization:** Fintech — requirements management, BPMN workflow modeling, financial reporting & BI
- **Experience:** 3+ years, fully remote, across 5 global time zones
- **Location:** Da Nang, Vietnam (open to remote worldwide)
- **Availability:** Open to opportunities, ~1 month notice
- **Email:** sumyatnoe906@gmail.com
- **LinkedIn:** https://linkedin.com/in/sumyatnoe99

## Core skills

Requirement elicitation & management, SQL and database querying, data
visualization (Power BI), Python (Pandas) and statistics, Agile/Scrum, process
modeling (BPMN), JIRA/Confluence/ClickUp, user stories and use cases, Lucidchart/
Draw.io/Figma. Strengths in stakeholder management, cross-functional
collaboration, problem solving, and negotiation.

## Experience

- **Business System Analyst — Alphared Solutions, Malaysia (Remote, Feb 2026–present).**
- **Business Analyst — Nexstack, Singapore (Remote, Mar 2022–Feb 2025).** Gathered
  and documented 50+ user stories and functional specs for financial advisory
  products; ran Agile/Scrum delivery in JIRA; built API test cases in Postman;
  built advanced Excel models and Power BI dashboards; used SQL and Python to
  automate data pipelines, cutting manual reporting time by ~20%.
- **QA Tester — Myanmar Institute of Business (Internship, Apr–Jun 2020).**

## Selected work

- **Financial Advisory Product Suite** — end-to-end requirements for a fintech
  advisory platform; 50+ user stories across 5 time zones (JIRA, BPMN, Agile).
- **Financial Reporting & Forecasting Dashboards** — advanced Excel models and
  Power BI dashboards giving management real-time KPI visibility.
- **Automated Data Pipeline** — SQL + Python (Pandas) ETL that cut manual
  reporting effort ~20% and improved data accuracy.
- **API Test Automation Framework** — Postman test cases that reduced integration
  errors and validated complex financial calculations.

## Education & credentials

- B.C.Tech (Bachelor of Computer Technology), Computer University, Loikaw.
- Certifications: Microsoft Business Analyst, IBM Data Analyst, Huawei Seeds for
  the Future 2020, Foundations of Software Testing and Validation (University of
  Leeds).
- Languages: English (fluent), Burmese (native), Japanese/Korean (basic).

## Contact

For business analyst opportunities (remote or on-site), email
sumyatnoe906@gmail.com or connect via https://linkedin.com/in/sumyatnoe99.
